LanguageData.FB_ColonyBrain_Structure_CaptureNerveNod: Extends the colony heart's grasping tendril limit by one and can relay manual tendril commands through the linked heart.
LanguageData.FB_CaptureNerveNode_NoCaptureSpawner: The linked heart has no grasping tendril reflex.
LanguageData.FB_CaptureNerveNode_LinkedHeart: Linked heart: {0}. Node slots: +{1}. Active tendrils: {2} / {3}.
LanguageData.FB_CaptureNerveNode_RaiseTendrilsDesc: Select a valid target near this nerve node. The node relays the command to its linked colony heart, spending the heart's hemogel and using the shared grasping tendril limit.
LanguageData.FB_GraspingTendrils_PlayerProtected: The colony will not grasp its own pawns, owned animals or allied fleshbeasts.
LanguageData.FB_GraspingTendrils_OutOfRange: Target is outside grasping tendril range.
LanguageData.FB_GraspingTendrils_PolicyReject: Target is forbidden by the grasping tendril policy.
LanguageData.FB_GraspingTendrils_RitualProtected: Target is already bound into an active flesh ritual.
LanguageData.FB_GraspingTendrils_NoFreeSlotsNext: No free grasping tendril slots. Next slot ready in: {0}.
LanguageData.FB_GraspingPolicy_SearchTooltip: Filter this list by name or defName.
LanguageData.FB_GraspingPolicy_FactionTooltip: Faction rules apply to humanlike targets before category defaults.
LanguageData.FB_GraspingPolicy_SpeciesTooltip: Species exceptions override category and faction rules. Player-owned creatures are still protected.
LanguageData.FB_GraspingPolicy_Category_HostileHumanl: Humanlike pawns from factions hostile to the player.
LanguageData.FB_GraspingPolicy_Category_WildAnimals_D: Animals not owned by the player colony.
LanguageData.FB_GraspingPolicy_Category_Mechanoids_De: Mechanical pawns. Current grasping tendrils can only bind flesh targets.
LanguageData.FB_GraspingPolicy_Category_OtherCreature: Non-humanlike, non-animal flesh creatures not owned by the player.
LanguageData.FB_GraspingTendrils_AutoDelay: Auto capture delay on flesh ground: {0} ticks.
